name: Hunyuan-TurboS
archDisplay: Hybrid Transformer-Mamba2 MoE, 128 layers with AMF/MF block pattern (560B total / 56B active)
note: First industry-deployed ultra-large Hybrid Transformer-Mamba MoE (560B/56B-active) fast-thinking model with adaptive CoT; ranked top-7 on LMSYS Chatbot Arena (1356).

results.notes: LMSYS Chatbot Arena Elo, overall top-7 rank at evaluation time

verificationNotes: Confirmed via arxiv abstract (2505.15431) and press coverage: 560B total/56B active, hybrid Transformer-Mamba2 MoE, 128 layers with AMF/MF block pattern, 256K context, all confirmed exact. Arena Elo 1356 (top-7, beating Gemini-2.0-Flash-001's 1352) confirmed literally on the arxiv page. Release date Feb 27, 2025 confirmed via Bloomberg headline/dateline. Corrected ctxK's specSource to arxiv (previously an unrelated aibase.com news URL); ctxK value itself (256) was already correct. Pricing: found ¥0.8/¥2 per 1M tokens (input/output) from Chinese coverage, which converts to roughly $0.11/$0.28 at prevailing CNY/USD rates - close to but not an exact match for the record's $0.12/$0.30; kept as a reasonable currency-converted approximation, not corrected.
